title: andryala glandulosa subsp. varia
intro: Andryala glandulosa subsp. varia, also known as the Andryala glandulosa variety, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Andryala glandulosa subsp. varia include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
